cobbler.name: cobbler_hammer
dialogue: Get a load of that stain. Doesn't look like shoe polish to me.
Shoe or a skull on its business end, the hammer will hammer regardless.
That sharp end sure ain't pretty.

fishing.name: harpoon
dialogue: This thing could take down one big fish.
Sharp. Heavy, too
Gotta know how to handle a tool like this.

carpentry.name: claw_hammer
dialogue: Wouldn't even have to swing it very hard.
That stain doesn't look like rust to me.
Drive a nail into hardwood. Drive a skull into pieces.

archery.name: arrow
dialogue: Not an easy hobby, archery. Not safe, either.
You'd do well to stay well away from the business end of a bow.
Interesting stain there. Looks like this one wasn't just used for practice.

medicine.name: poison
dialogue: Well, this sure isn't a healing tonic, now is it?
This'll give you one hell of a stomach ache.
Wouldn't want a spoonful of this stuff...

cobbler.name: shoes
dialogue: Seems a skilled cobbler fixed these right up
Brand new nails in the sole. Woulda needed a specialized hammer.

cobbler.name: cobbler_customer_invoices
dialogue: Looks like Enfrin owns this shop.
Well, well done Enfrin. Must be real handy with that hammer.
Popular shop. Good for its owner...good for Enfrin.

fishing.name: rowboat
dialogue: Registered to Enfrin. Interesting
Looks like it's got a harpoon rack built-in. Convenient.

carpentry.name: lumber
dialogue: Lots of supply. Must get good business, here.
Hardwood. Fixed with nails, not screws. Bet the owner of this shop has a trusty hammer.

carpentry.name: carpentry_customer_invoices
dialogue: Looks like Sil owns this shop.
Well, well done Sil. Must be real handy with that hammer.
Popular shop. Good for its owner...good for Sil.

archery.name: target
dialogue: One hell of an archer practiced with this.
Look at all those bullseyes.

medicine.name: medicine
dialogue: So many tonics. One wrong ingredient and healing turns to hurting.
Gotta be real well-read to know what you're doing with this stuff.

medicine.name: medicine_customer_invoices
dialogue: Looks like Chorg owns this shop.
Well, well done Chorg. Must be one hell of a doctor.
Popular shop. Good for its owner...good for Chorg.

library.name: books
dialogue: 'Do's and Don't's of Tonic Crafting.' Gotta know how to make poison to avoid it? Right.
'The Perfect Crime.' No such thing.

library.name: borrow_list
dialogue: Chorg spent a lot of time here. Reading all about tonic crafting.
'How To Get Away With Murder.' Oh Chorg. What do you need to know that for?
Looks like Chorg recently borrowed...'100 Deadly Plants to Avoid.' Hah. Right. Avoid

chorg.name: books
dialogue: Chorg's library books...
'How To Get Away With Murder.' Not a good look.
'100 Deadly Plants to Avoid.' Uh-huh...

chorg.name: sil_portrait
dialogue: A portrait of Sil. Lovebird.

enfrin.name: sil_portrait
dialogue: A portrait of Sil. Weird.

enfrin.name: fountain_pen
dialogue: Waxing poetic, Enfrin?

sil.name: chorg_sculpture
bardialogueks: A wood carving of Chorg. Lovebird.

sil.name: anon_love_letter
dialogue: Looks like it was written with a fountain pen.
